profile.name: Md Arshad Ali
profile.summary: Cloud & DevOps Engineer with 3+ years of experience designing and maintaining scalable, reliable, and secure infrastructure. Skilled in AWS, Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD, and automation, with a proven record of reducing deployment times, cutting cloud costs, and driving reliability improvements. Strong passion for Site Reliability Engineering, platform efficiency, and automation at scale.

Cloud Platforms: AWS (EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, API Gateway)

highlights: Designed and deployed cloud-native apps on AWS (EC2, Lambda, S3, RDS, API Gateway)
Built AWS Cloud Data Inventory Tool to automate discovery/reporting across accounts → reduced manual effort by 80%
Automated infrastructure provisioning with Terraform and CloudFormation
Improved CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, AWS CodePipeline) → 60% faster deployments
Implemented security compliance checks (AWS Config, GuardDuty)
Optimized AWS usage → reduced monthly bills by 20%
Enhanced monitoring with CloudWatch and improved incident response protocols
Collaborated with dev, QA, and platform teams for stable releases & continuous delivery
Built full-stack applications using React.js, Node.js, Python
Designed RESTful APIs and integrated with MongoDB & SQL databases
Prototyped ML features for client solutions
Managed server deployment & cloud integration for smoother delivery

projects.name: AWS Cloud Data Inventory Tool
projects.description: Automated discovery and reporting system for AWS resources across multiple accounts

projects.description: Redesigned deployment pipelines for faster and more reliable releases
